title: Validate stack selection onboarding changes
description: Run targeted and full test validation for the menu-driven init flow, confirming prompt behavior, canonical stack defaults, non-interactive consistency, and absence of regressions in onboarding-related tests.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant init/onboarding tests pass for the updated prompt flow.
Full test suite passes with `uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q`.
Any failures are reported with enough detail to identify whether they are regressions or unrelated pre-existing issues.

handoff_summary.completed: Ran targeted tests for test_onboarding_prompts.py (17 tests), test_onboarding_scaffold.py (53 tests), test_cli_init.py (25 tests) — all 95 passed. Ran full suite (1314 tests + 21 subtests) — all passed with zero failures.
handoff_summary.risks: None identified. All canonical-name exact-match semantics for _language_specific_known_issues() verified. Free-text aliases correctly return empty string.
handoff_summary.design_decisions: No changes made. Tests validated as-is.
handoff_summary.test_coverage_notes: 95 targeted tests cover: _select_from_list (valid/empty/invalid/out-of-range inputs), STACKS catalog structure (Python first, Other last with empty commands), collect_init_answers (defaults, custom stacks, Other free-text, invalid input retry), _language_specific_known_issues (canonical exact-match semantics — Node.js/TypeScript/Go produce content; free-text aliases like 'golang', 'nodejs', 'TypeScript/Node.js' return empty), seed_memory_files (canonical vs free-text language names), scaffold_project (structure, config round-trip, memory bootstrap), commit_scaffold (git operations, idempotency). Full suite (1314 tests) passes without regressions.
handoff_summary.known_limitations: Memory database not initialized in the worktree (takt memory search commands returned 'database not found'). This is expected for a fresh worktree and does not affect test execution.

execution_history.summary: All targeted and full suite tests pass. 95 onboarding/init tests pass (TestSelectFromList, TestStacksCatalogOtherEntry, TestCollectInitAnswers, TestSeedMemoryFiles, TestLanguageSpecificKnownIssues, TestUpdateGitignore, TestCreateSpecsHowto, TestScaffoldProject, TestScaffoldProjectLoadConfigIntegration, TestCommitScaffold, TestScaffoldProjectMemoryBootstrap, TestInitParserWiring, TestStacksCatalog, TestCommandInit). Full suite: 1314 passed, 21 subtests passed, 0 failures.

last_agent_result.summary: All targeted and full suite tests pass. 95 onboarding/init tests pass.
